future_routes: success/cancel pages or existing route query-state handling if safe
payment_truth_rules: Checkout redirect success is not sufficient payment proof.
Webhook-confirmed events are required for durable paid access.
One-time products and subscription products must be stored separately.
Promo/free/admin access must remain explicitly labeled.
revenue_truth_rules: Revenue claims remain unavailable until payment records are persistently indexed.
Checkout starts, redirects, abandoned sessions, promo access, free access, and admin access are not revenue.
implementation_limits: Stripe Checkout routes were not added.
Stripe webhook routes were not added.
Payment state writes were not added.
No fake Stripe price IDs were created.
close_behavior_before: Business Assessment visual artifact nav returned to /business-assessment without preserving the retrieved result context.
close_behavior_after: Result links include a safe returnTo target and visual artifact nav returns to /business-assessment?id={profile_id}#business-assessment-results.
